message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title クラス図_6月UML例題

class ItemManagerUser {
    + void main(String[]:args)
}

class ItemManager {
    - List<Item> itemList
    + void regist(Item:item)
    + void displayAll()
    + void serachDisplay()
}

class Item {
    - String name
    - int price
    + void Item(String:name, int:price)
    --- getter ---
    + String getName()
    + int getPrice()
    --- setter ---
    + void setName(String: name)
    + void setPrice(int: price)
}

ItemManagerUser -- ItemManager
ItemManagerUser o-- Item
ItemManager -- Item

@enduml
```
